get.description: Time-bucketed min/max/avg/count aggregates per metric for one greenhouse over [from, to] — the derived series the dashboard charts for trends, distinct from the raw telemetry range query (platform interfaces §3 analytics surface; data model §4). `interval` sets the bucket size (default 1h); `metric` optionally restricts to one metric. An invalid window (from after to) or unknown interval/metric is rejected with 422.

200.description: Aggregated series over the requested window.
